case_title: BOSWELL, RONALD vs. MISSION & VALENCIA, INC. DBA BURGER KING

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOSWELL, RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION & VALENCIA, INC. DBA BURGER KING
